summary: Comprehensive diagnostic matrix for Linux kernel Hard LOCKUP scenarios
init_cmds: log | grep -e lockup -e LOCKUP -e blocked -e rcu_sched

matrix.trigger: System hangs with tasks waiting for page writeback completion
matrix.arg_hints: addr: memory page address from backtrace
matrix.why: Check kernel memory allocation for spinlock or data structure
matrix.expect: Memory contents showing allocation type and owner

matrix.trigger: Need mount information for device superblock
matrix.arg_hints: addr: superblock address from memory

matrix.trigger: Module {modname} involved in lockup
matrix.arg_hints: addr: module address from backtrace

matrix.trigger: Exception RIP at {offset}
matrix.arg_hints: offset: RIP value from exception

matrix.trigger: KVM lock spinning detected
matrix.arg_hints: addr: kvm_vcpu address from backtrace

matrix.trigger: Ioctl or close hook functions in module
matrix.arg_hints: addr: file_operations address from module

matrix.trigger: RIP: generic_exec_single+{offset}
matrix.arg_hints: offset: RIP offset from panic message
matrix.why: Disassemble function to find panic location
matrix.expect: Assembly code showing instruction at panic

matrix.trigger: Need to examine memory at specific address {addr}
matrix.arg_hints: addr: Calculated address from registers or stack

matrix.trigger: Check perf_event pending irq_work structure
matrix.arg_hints: addr: Address from backtrace or registers

matrix.trigger: Need to disassemble __wake_up function
matrix.arg_hints: offset: Offset from backtrace or registers
matrix.expect: Assembly code showing instruction at panic

matrix.trigger: Identify zone involved in CPU {cpu} lockup
matrix.arg_hints: addr: Zone address from memory analysis
matrix.why: Identify zone involved in CPU lockup

matrix.trigger: Get pick_next_task function pointer
matrix.arg_hints: addr: sched_class pointer address

matrix.trigger: Examine zone->lock spinlock address
matrix.arg_hints: addr: Zone structure address

matrix.trigger: Check runqueue for CPU {cpu}
matrix.arg_hints: cpu: CPU number to check

matrix.trigger: mce: [Hardware Error]: Machine check events logged
matrix.why: Check kernel log for MCE events
matrix.expect: Machine check error details and timestamps

matrix.trigger: Tasks in uninterruptible sleep state
matrix.arg_hints: UN: from ps output showing D state
matrix.why: Identify processes stuck in D state
matrix.expect: List of processes in uninterruptible sleep

matrix.trigger: Analyze backtraces of uninterruptible tasks
matrix.arg_hints: UN: from ps output showing D state
matrix.why: Check what's blocking D state processes

matrix.trigger: Check logical volume status
Check request queue timeout timer status
matrix.arg_hints: addr: request_queue address from backtrace
matrix.expect: Timeout value and work timer status

matrix.trigger: Examine timed out SCSI commands
Task looping in spinlock in kernel mode
tvec_base values way behind current jiffies
matrix.arg_hints: addr: tvec_base address from timer code

matrix.trigger: Exception RIP: _spin_lock_irqsave+{offset}
matrix.arg_hints: offset: RIP offset from panic message

matrix.trigger: All CPUs show timer discrepancies
matrix.arg_hints: addr: per-cpu tvec_base addresses

matrix.trigger: Need to examine specific kernel structure
matrix.arg_hints: modname: structure name, addr: structure address

matrix.trigger: Process ID mentioned in lockup warning
matrix.arg_hints: pid: process ID from ps output
matrix.why: Examine process state at time of lockup
matrix.expect: Process structure showing state and resources

matrix.trigger: SCSI device involved in timeout or lockup
matrix.arg_hints: addr: from SCSI command pointer in trace
matrix.why: Examine the SCSI device associated with timed-out command
matrix.expect: Device structure showing host and target information

matrix.trigger: Need to examine SCSI host structure details
matrix.why: Check Scsi_Host hostdata offset for driver-specific data
matrix.expect: Offset value for hostdata field in Scsi_Host

matrix.trigger: Module-specific function appears in lockup stack
matrix.arg_hints: modname: from module name in warning message
matrix.why: Examine module's device probe function structure
matrix.expect: Function layout showing potential race conditions

matrix.trigger: Need to display SCSI host and device information
matrix.why: Display host and device information for SCSI subsystem
matrix.expect: List of SCSI hosts and their associated drivers

matrix.trigger: WARNING about kref refcount in module function
matrix.why: Check kref refcount field offset for atomic operations
matrix.expect: Offset of refcount field within kref structure

matrix.trigger: Spinlock function in RIP register during lockup
matrix.why: Examine spinlock structure layout for lock contention
matrix.expect: Spinlock structure showing lock state fields

matrix.trigger: Soft lockup messages with RIP: native_queued_spin_lock_slowpath
matrix.why: Check for soft lockup messages before hard lockup
matrix.expect: RIP addresses pointing to spinlock functions

matrix.trigger: Check spinlock status and contention
matrix.arg_hints: addr: spinlock address from RIP analysis

matrix.trigger: rcu_sched CPU stalls detected on multiple CPUs
matrix.arg_hints: addr: rcu_state address from kernel symbols
matrix.why: List rcu_state flavors to check RCU stalls
matrix.expect: RCU state information and stall details

matrix.trigger: Massive calls to shrink_slab() in stack traces
matrix.why: Check for shrink_slab() calls in backtraces

matrix.trigger: Examine dentry cache operations in backtraces
matrix.why: Check for dentry cache pruning operations
matrix.expect: Processes stuck in dentry cache pruning

matrix.trigger: Check kernel log for lockup patterns
matrix.why: Search for lockup-related messages in kernel log
